description.en-US: Milesight WS513 — LoRaWAN (Class A) sensor that monitors relay / dry-contact state. Uplinks are channel-TLV frames on FPort 85. (Datasheet/user guide cover the WS51X series.)
description.pt-BR: Milesight WS513 — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) que monitora relé / contato seco. Os uplinks são quadros channel-TLV no FPort 85. (Datasheet/manual cobrem a série WS51X.)
